name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (h : Function.Surjective f) :
    n ≥ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_surjective
  exact h

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) h

  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2^n > 0 := by
  apply Nat.pow_pos
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm (A B : Finset ℕ) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) h

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset α) (h : s.card = n) :
    (s.powerset).card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, h]

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
    (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) :
    StrictMono (f ∘ g) :=
  StrictMono.comp hf hg

name: cantor_no_surjection
code:
import Mathlib

theorem cantor_no_surjection (A : Type*) : ¬∃ f : A → Set A, Function.Surjective f := by
  intro h
  cases' h with f hf
  exact Function.cantor_surjective f hf

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  exact Set.empty_subset s

theorem empty_subset_finset (s : Finset α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  exact Finset.empty_subset s

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : Bool.not (Bool.not b) = b := by
  cases b with
  | false => rfl
  | true => rfl

import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

    (f : β → γ) (g : α → β) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) :
    StrictMono (f ∘ g) :=

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {f : α → β} {g : γ → α}
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) :=
  Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) :
    n ≤ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n :=
  Nat.even_or_odd n

name: nat_strong_induction
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_strong_induction (P : ℕ → Prop) (h₀ : P 0) (h₁ : ∀ n, (∀ m < n, P m) → P n) : ∀ n, P n := by
  intro n
  induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
  | h n ih =>
    apply h₁
    intro m hm
    apply ih m hm

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  omega

  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
